# Stella UI

Stella UI (`@stella-ds/react` v0.2.0) is a React component library with a celestial design system. It ships alongside `@stella-ds/theme` for design tokens delivered as CSS custom properties (`--stella-*`).

## Installation

```bash
npm install @stella-ds/react @stella-ds/theme
```

## Setup

```tsx
// In your app entry point — inject CSS variables
import '@stella-ds/theme/css';
```

Or call `injectCSSVars()` at runtime:

```ts
import { injectCSSVars } from '@stella-ds/theme';
injectCSSVars();
```

---

## Components

### Alert

Inline feedback banner.

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'info' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'error'` | `'info'` | Visual style |
| onClose | `() => void` | — | Shows close button when provided |

```tsx
<Alert variant="success" onClose={() => {}}>
  <AlertTitle>Saved</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your changes have been saved.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

---

### Avatar

Round image with fallback initials.

```tsx
import { Avatar } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| alt | `string` | required | Accessible label |
| src | `string` | — | Image URL |
| size | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl'` | `'md'` | Avatar size |
| fallback | `string` | — | Initials shown when no image |

```tsx
<Avatar alt="Jane Doe" fallback="JD" size="md" />
```

---

### Background

Animated visual background.

```tsx
import { Background } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'stars' \| 'galaxy' \| 'milkyway' \| 'gradient' \| 'solid'` | `'stars'` | Background style |
| color | `'cosmos' \| 'nebula' \| 'aurora' \| 'mixed'` | `'cosmos'` | Color scheme |
| theme | `'dark' \| 'light'` | `'dark'` | Light or dark mode |
| twinkle | `boolean` | `true` | Enable star twinkle animation |
| ribbons | `number` | — | Number of ribbon elements |
| tokenColor | `string` | — | Override CSS token color |
| showGradient | `boolean` | — | Overlay gradient |

```tsx
<Background variant="stars" color="cosmos" theme="dark" twinkle />
```

---

### Badge

Inline label chip.

```tsx
import { Badge } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'solid' \| 'outline' \| 'subtle'` | `'solid'` | Visual style |
| color | `'default' \| 'primary' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'error'` | `'default'` | Semantic color |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md'` | `'md'` | Badge size |

```tsx
<Badge variant="subtle" color="success" size="sm">New</Badge>
```

---

### Breadcrumb

Navigation trail. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem,
  BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbSeparator
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (BreadcrumbLink) | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |
| isCurrentPage | `boolean` | `false` | Marks the current page |

```tsx
<Breadcrumb>
  <BreadcrumbList>
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink href="/">Home</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
    <BreadcrumbSeparator />
    <BreadcrumbItem><BreadcrumbLink isCurrentPage>Page</BreadcrumbLink></BreadcrumbItem>
  </BreadcrumbList>
</Breadcrumb>
```

---

### Button

Interactive button with variants and loading state.

```tsx
import { Button } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'solid' \| 'outline' \| 'ghost' \| 'glow'` | `'solid'` | Visual style |
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Button size |
| loading | `boolean` | `false` | Shows spinner, disables interaction |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element (Radix Slot) |

```tsx
<Button variant="solid" size="md" loading={false}>Click me</Button>
```

---

### Card

Content container. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription,
  CardContent, CardFooter
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Card) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------|------|---------|-------------|
| hoverable | `boolean` | `false` | Adds hover lift effect |

```tsx
<Card hoverable>
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Title</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Description</CardDescription>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>Content here</CardContent>
  <CardFooter>Footer</CardFooter>
</Card>
```

---

### Checkbox

Radix-based checkbox with label support.

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Checkbox size |
| label | `ReactNode` | — | Accessible label |
| error | `boolean` | `false` | Error state styling |

```tsx
<Checkbox size="md" label="Accept terms" />
```

---

### Dialog

Modal overlay. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader,
  DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription,
  DialogClose, DialogOverlay
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (DialogContent) | Type | Default | Description |
|----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| showClose | `boolean` | `true` | Show the close (×) button |

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Description</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter><DialogClose asChild><Button>Close</Button></DialogClose></DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

---

### Footer

Site footer. Compound component.

```tsx
import { Footer, FooterContent, FooterDivider, FooterBottom } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

```tsx
<Footer>
  <FooterContent>Links and info</FooterContent>
  <FooterDivider />
  <FooterBottom>© 2025 Stella UI</FooterBottom>
</Footer>
```

---

### Header

Site header. Compound component.

```tsx
import { Header, HeaderBrand, HeaderNav, HeaderActions } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Header) | Type | Default | Description |
|---------------|------|---------|-------------|
| sticky | `boolean` | `false` | Sticky positioning |
| blur | `boolean` | `false` | Backdrop blur |
| mobileNav | `ReactNode` | — | Mobile navigation slot |

```tsx
<Header sticky blur>
  <HeaderBrand>Stella UI</HeaderBrand>
  <HeaderNav>{/* nav links */}</HeaderNav>
  <HeaderActions>{/* buttons */}</HeaderActions>
</Header>
```

---

### Heading

Semantic heading element.

```tsx
import { Heading } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| level | `1 \| 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 5 \| 6` | `2` | HTML heading level |
| size | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'xl' \| '2xl' \| '3xl'` | `'md'` | Visual size |
| weight | `'normal' \| 'medium' \| 'semibold' \| 'bold'` | `'bold'` | Font weight |
| align | `'left' \| 'center' \| 'right'` | `'left'` | Text alignment |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |

```tsx
<Heading level={1} size="3xl" weight="bold">Hello World</Heading>
```

---

### Input

Text input field.

```tsx
import { Input } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Input size |
| error | `boolean \| string` | `false` | Error state; string shows message |

```tsx
<Input size="md" placeholder="Enter text" error="Required field" />
```

---

### PageGrid

CSS grid layout container.

```tsx
import { PageGrid } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| layout | `'single' \| 'sidebar-left' \| 'sidebar-right' \| 'three-col'` | `'single'` | Grid layout |
| gap | `'4' \| '6' \| '8' \| '12'` | `'6'` | Grid gap |
| fullBleed | `boolean` | `false` | Remove side padding |

```tsx
<PageGrid layout="sidebar-left" gap="8">
  <aside>Sidebar</aside>
  <main>Content</main>
</PageGrid>
```

---

### Radio

Radio button group. Compound component.

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioItem } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (RadioGroup) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Radio size |
| error | `boolean` | `false` | Error state |
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'vertical'` | Layout direction |

| Prop (RadioItem) | Type | Default | Description |
|------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| value | `string` | required | Radio value |
| label | `ReactNode` | — | Accessible label |

```tsx
<RadioGroup orientation="vertical">
  <RadioItem value="a" label="Option A" />
  <RadioItem value="b" label="Option B" />
</RadioGroup>
```

---

### Section

Semantic `<section>` wrapper.

```tsx
import { Section } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'full'` | `'md'` | Max-width constraint |
| padding | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg' \| 'none'` | `'md'` | Vertical padding |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |

```tsx
<Section size="lg" padding="lg">Page section content</Section>
```

---

### Select

Dropdown select. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem,
  SelectGroup, SelectLabel, SelectSeparator
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (SelectTrigger) | Type | Default | Description |
|----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Trigger size |
| error | `boolean \| string` | `false` | Error state |
| placeholder | `string` | — | Placeholder text |

```tsx
<Select>
  <SelectTrigger placeholder="Choose..." />
  <SelectContent>
    <SelectItem value="a">Option A</SelectItem>
    <SelectItem value="b">Option B</SelectItem>
  </SelectContent>
</Select>
```

---

### Separator

Visual divider line.

```tsx
import { Separator } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| orientation | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical'` | `'horizontal'` | Divider direction |
| decorative | `boolean` | `true` | Hides from assistive tech when true |

```tsx
<Separator orientation="horizontal" />
```

---

### Skeleton

Loading placeholder.

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'text' \| 'circular' \| 'rectangular'` | `'text'` | Shape of placeholder |
| width | `string \| number` | — | Width override |
| height | `string \| number` | — | Height override |
| lines | `number` | — | Number of text lines |
| animate | `boolean` | `true` | Pulse animation |

```tsx
<Skeleton variant="text" lines={3} />
```

---

### Stack

Flexbox layout utility.

```tsx
import { Stack } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| direction | `'vertical' \| 'horizontal'` | `'vertical'` | Flex direction |
| gap | `'1' \| '2' \| '3' \| '4' \| '6' \| '8' \| '12' \| '16'` | `'4'` | Gap between children |
| align | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'stretch'` | `'stretch'` | Align items |
| justify | `'start' \| 'center' \| 'end' \| 'between' \| 'around'` | `'start'` | Justify content |
| wrap | `boolean` | `false` | Allow wrapping |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |

```tsx
<Stack direction="horizontal" gap="4" align="center">
  <Button>A</Button>
  <Button>B</Button>
</Stack>
```

---

### Switch

Toggle switch.

```tsx
import { Switch } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Switch size |
| label | `ReactNode` | — | Accessible label |
| error | `boolean` | `false` | Error state |

```tsx
<Switch size="md" label="Enable notifications" />
```

---

### Tabs

Tab navigation. Compound component.

```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Tabs) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'line' \| 'solid'` | `'line'` | Tab style |

```tsx
<Tabs variant="line" defaultValue="a">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="a">Tab A</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="b">Tab B</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="a">Content A</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="b">Content B</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

---

### Text

Body text element.

```tsx
import { Text } from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| size | `'xs' \| 'sm' \| 'md' \| 'lg'` | `'md'` | Font size |
| weight | `'normal' \| 'medium' \| 'semibold' \| 'bold'` | `'normal'` | Font weight |
| color | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'disabled'` | `'primary'` | Text color token |
| align | `'left' \| 'center' \| 'right'` | `'left'` | Text alignment |
| as | `'p' \| 'span' \| 'div' \| 'label'` | `'p'` | Rendered element |
| asChild | `boolean` | `false` | Render as child element |
| truncate | `boolean` | `false` | Single-line ellipsis truncation |

```tsx
<Text size="sm" color="secondary" truncate>Short description</Text>
```

---

### Toast

Notification toasts. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  ToastProvider, ToastViewport, Toast,
  ToastTitle, ToastDescription, ToastClose, ToastAction
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (Toast) | Type | Default | Description |
|--------------|------|---------|-------------|
| variant | `'info' \| 'success' \| 'warning' \| 'error'` | `'info'` | Semantic color |

| Prop (ToastClose) | Type | Default | Description |
|-------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| label | `string` | — | Accessible close label |

```tsx
<ToastProvider>
  <Toast variant="success">
    <ToastTitle>Done!</ToastTitle>
    <ToastDescription>Action completed.</ToastDescription>
    <ToastClose label="Dismiss" />
  </Toast>
  <ToastViewport />
</ToastProvider>
```

---

### Tooltip

Contextual tooltip. Compound component.

```tsx
import {
  TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent
} from '@stella-ds/react';
```

| Prop (TooltipContent) | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------------------|------|---------|-------------|
| side | `'top' \| 'right' \| 'bottom' \| 'left'` | `'top'` | Preferred placement |
| sideOffset | `number` | — | Distance from trigger |

```tsx
<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip>
    <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Hover me</Button></TooltipTrigger>
    <TooltipContent side="top" sideOffset={4}>Tooltip text</TooltipContent>
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

---

## Design Tokens (quick reference)

All tokens are CSS custom properties prefixed with `--stella-`.

| Category | Example variable |
|----------|-----------------|
| Color — cosmos (indigo/primary) | `--stella-color-cosmos-500` |
| Color — nebula (purple/accent) | `--stella-color-nebula-500` |
| Color — aurora (cyan/accent) | `--stella-color-aurora-500` |
| Color — nova (emerald/success) | `--stella-color-nova-500` |
| Color — void (backgrounds) | `--stella-color-void-base` |
| Color — starlight (text) | `--stella-color-starlight-primary` |
| Typography | `--stella-font-size-md` |
| Spacing | `--stella-spacing-4` |
| Border radius | `--stella-border-radius-md` |
| Shadow | `--stella-shadow-md` |
| Transition | `--stella-transition-default` |

Usage in CSS Modules:

```css
color: var(--stella-color-cosmos-500);
background: var(--stella-color-void-base);
```
